name: angular-scheduler-minimal
description: Minimal Angular app that installs ONLY the scheduler slice of @jects/angular. It depends on @jects/angular + @jects/scheduler and imports from the per-component subpath '@jects/angular/scheduler', so a bundler never has to resolve any sibling engine (@jects/grid, @jects/gantt, …). This is the isolated-install demo for the per-component subpath exports.
